content.json:
# Firework Logs by Risk Score
---

Displays Flare events from the past 30 days, broken down by risk score level.

content.query:
FireworkV2_CL
| make-series num=count() on TimeGenerated from ago(30d) to now() step 8h by strcat("Risk Score ", tostring(RiskScore))
| render timechart

content.json:
# Collected Document Sources

Displays a daily bar chart of events over the last 30 days, broken down by source.

content.query:
FireworkV2_CL
| where isnotempty(source)
| make-series num=count() on TimeGenerated from ago(30d) to now() step 1d by source
| render barchart

FireworkV2_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| summarize num=count() by source
| where notempty(source)
| render piechart

content.json:
# Leaked Credential Events
---

Displays a time chart of leaked credential events over the last 30 days, plotted every 8 hours.

content.query:
FireworkV2_CL
| where notempty(uid) and split(uid, "/")[0] == "leaked_credential" 
| make-series Total_Leaked_Credentials=count() on TimeGenerated from ago(30d) to now() step 8h 
| render timechart
